name: Slack
description: Slack connector for elizaOS agents with Eliza Cloud OAuth and local Socket Mode support.

SLACK_APP_TOKEN.label: App Token
SLACK_APP_TOKEN.help: Slack App Token (xapp-...) for Socket Mode connections

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.label: Bot Token
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.help: Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) for API authentication

SLACK_USER_TOKEN.label: User Token
SLACK_USER_TOKEN.help: Optional User Token (xoxp-...) for enhanced permissions

SLACK_CHANNEL_IDS.label: Channel Ids
SLACK_CHANNEL_IDS.help: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to restrict the bot to

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.label: Signing Secret
SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.help: Slack Signing Secret for verifying requests

SLACK_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Bot Messages
SLACK_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will ignore messages from other bots

SLACK_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.label: Should Respond Only To Mentions
SLACK_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.help: If true, the bot will only respond when mentioned

owner.notes: The user's own Slack identity (xoxp-... user token), connected via Eliza Cloud OAuth so the agent can read the user's channels, write messages as them, search their conversations, and read files they have access to.

agent.notes: The agent's own Slack bot identity (xoxb-... bot token), installed into the workspace via Eliza Cloud OAuth. Posts, mentions, replies, and DMs flow through the bot user.
